Video.summary: From sowing to reaping, everything Nina and Brendon do is connected to the rhythm of the seasons.
Video.title: A Season for Everything

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: It’s time for hands to get dirty as Nina unearths the wonders of good soil.
Video.title: Good Soil

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Meet Nina and Brendan, who swapped sound checks for soil and left life on the road for life on a farm.
Video.title: Welcome to the Farm

Video.summary: Nina proves that citrus trees teach us valuable things about seasons and relationships.
Video.title: Fields not Factories

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Andrea's off to Palm Springs for a fun-filled day with actor Jonathan Bennett.
Video.title: Jonathan Bennett’s Mai Tai Manor

Video.summary: Andrea lands in Upstate New York for pancakes, ping pong and plenty of fun with Nigel Barker.
Video.title: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Image.alt: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Kimberly and Justin need an overhaul for their twelve-sided, dodecagon dream house.
Video.title: Kimberly & Justin’s Dodecagon Dream

Video.summary: Margot and Josh spent years perfecting every room in the house but overlooked their bedroom.
Video.title: Margot & Josh’s Teal Transformation

Video.summary: Nina and Brendon’s walk through the dark valley leads to unforeseen miracles and joy.
Video.title: After the Rain

Video.summary: As the Shirley family farm continues to grow, so does the community it celebrates.
Video.title: The Joy of Sharing

Video.summary: Andrea heads to Hollywood for smoothies and trivia with American Ninja Warrior's Matt Iseman.
Video.title: Matt Iseman’s Personal Paradise

Video.summary: Andrea’s off to Huntington Beach, California to spend the day with Cassie Randolph.
Video.title: Cassie Randolph’s Beachside Bungalow

Video.summary: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.
Video.title: A Tiny Frame of Mind / Tiny Cabin & Caboose

Image.alt: A Tiny Frame of Mind / Tiny Cabin & Caboose
A Tiny Frame of Mind / Tiny Cabin & Caboose
A Tiny Frame of Mind / Tiny Cabin & Caboose

Video.summary: In NJ, Caley Svensson transformed a former Tuscany style home into an English countryside haven.
Video.title: An English-Inspired Home with a Farm in New Jersey

Image.alt: An English-Inspired Home with a Farm in New Jersey
An English-Inspired Home with a Farm in New Jersey
An English-Inspired Home with a Farm in New Jersey

Video.summary: Fran and Theresa want to create a safe, family-friendly haven for their 13 grandkids.
Video.title: Fran & Theresa’s Family-Friendly Haven

Video.summary: Rebecca Vizard's creative spirit thrives in every corner of this Louisiana Delta house.
Video.title: Eclectic Louisiana Home of Textile Designer Rebecca Vizard

Image.alt: Eclectic Louisiana Home of Textile Designer Rebecca Vizard
Eclectic Louisiana Home of Textile Designer Rebecca Vizard

Innovation and Inlets / Peaks of Ringgold

Video.summary: Join Terri and Lee Woodall for an inside look at their home in Georgia, known as the Healing House.
Video.title: Southern Heritage: A Timeless Georgia Estate

Image.alt: Southern Heritage: A Timeless Georgia Estate
Southern Heritage: A Timeless Georgia Estate
Southern Heritage: A Timeless Georgia Estate

Video.summary: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.
Video.title: Meet the Flippers

Video.summary: Before taking the class on a much-needed field trip, Brad and Jennifer drop in to check each flipper's progress.
Video.title: Demo and Drywall

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.
Video.title: Doughnuts and Decisions

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.
Video.title: Who's Got the Grit?

Video.summary: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.
Video.title: Hidden Gems in Hocking Hills / Rare & Remote Rentals

Video.summary: Country music duo Maddie & Tae hop off the tour bus in Nashville to salute Operation Song.
Video.title: A Salute to Operation Song

Video.summary: International model Nicole Williams English heads to the Bronx to celebrate Covenant House.
Video.title: A Celebration of Covenant House

Video.summary: Designer Lindsey Gregg helps homeowners transform a neglected space - and all she needs is a day!
Video.title: Entrepreneur Epiphany & Surf Chic

Video.summary: Designer Lindsey Gregg helps homeowners transform a neglected space - and all she needs is a day!
Video.title: 20/20 Vision & White and Bright

Video.summary: Designer Lindsey Gregg helps homeowners transform a neglected space - and all she needs is a day!
Video.title: Hand-Me-Don'ts & All Hands on Deck

Video.summary: Graduation looms near, and the flippers are hard at work putting the finishing touches on each home.
Video.title: Finishing Touches

Video.summary: The classmates unveil their spectacular finished homes in a final review with Brad and Jennifer.
Video.title: A "" Graduation
